article_title: Child Safety Belt and Passenger Restraint Requirements
text:
(a) No individual may sell or offer for sale a child passenger restraint system that was in use by a child during an accident involving a motor vehicle.

(b) A violation of this section shall be punished by a fine of one hundred dollars ($100).
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 5. Other Equipment [27000 - 28160]
#### Article 3.3. Child Safety Belt and Passenger Restraint Requirements [27360 - 27368]
##### § 27362.1

(a) No individual may sell or offer for sale a child passenger restraint system that was in use by a child during an accident involving a motor vehicle.

(b) A violation of this section shall be punished by a fine of one hundred dollars ($100).

*(Added by Stats. 2002, Ch. 703, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 2003.)*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: No individual may sell or offer for sale a child passenger restraint system that was in use by a child during an accident involving a motor vehicle.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A violation of this section shall be punished by a fine of one hundred dollars ($100).
